flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Allen College rose 25% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.0k → $18.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Allen College fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (314 → 261).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Allen College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Allen College are 30% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($71.3k vs $54.9k).
